articles.author: Aruna Viswanatha, Evan Gershkovich, Joel Schectman
articles.title: The CIA Operative Who Spied on the U.A.E.—and Played a Role in Its AI Win - WSJ
articles.description: While conducting espionage against powerful sheikh’s tech company, Jonny Gannon helped Gulf country quash Washington suspicions about China ties
articles.content:
Jonny Gannon had one final mission. 
The longtime CIA operative had exfiltrated the families of spies from the most repressive of Middle Eastern regimes and tattooed the word ARGONAUT, an homage to … [+432 chars]
